productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Black Top
description: Style NoteLook chic and feel comfortable in this black top from united colors of benetton. The knit cotton adds to it a touch of warmth, while the fabric feels soft on the skin and keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes.Product DetailsBlack top made of cotton knit, with short, puffed raglan sleeves that have ribbed cuffs and a buttoned flap, ribbed V-neck, has a ribbed hem and Big Ben logo appliqué d on left hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorations
